AGNR699 Special Problems (1-3 Credits) Formerly: AGRI699.

AGNR789 Special Topics (1-3 Credits) Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs. Formerly: AGRI789.

AGNR798 Seminar in Rural Education (1-3 Credits) Problems in the organization, administration, and supervision of the several agencies of rural and/or vocational education. Repeatable to: 8 credits if content differs. Formerly: AGRI798.
